constitution.description: Non-negotiables, POM architecture, anti-hallucination, quality gate

workflows.description: SOPs for test tasks, multi-agent orchestration, bugfix

personas.description: Agent persona definitions: orchestrator, researcher, builder, reviewer, qa-gatekeeper

skills-ref.description: E2E test dispatching and selector quality skills

researcher.description: Read-only code explorer. Finds routes, components, selectors, API endpoints. Never modifies code.

builder.description: Implements POM files and spec files. Creates/edits test code only.

reviewer.description: Audits POM and spec files for quality and spec compliance. Read-only gate.

qa-gatekeeper.description: Runs tests, generates structured evidence, produces pass/fail summary. Read-only outside test execution.

orchestrator.description: Lead architect. Plans, dispatches sub-agents, tracks progress, generates summaries.
